title: Liquor Shops Declared Dry Ahead of Polls
summary: Liquor shops and bars across Coimbatore have been ordered to remain closed for three days ahead of polling day, as authorities enforce strict measures to ensure peaceful elections.

title: DMK and AIADMK Cadres Clash in Ramanathapuram
summary: Clashes broke out between rival party cadres over voter bribery allegations, leading to tension and minor property damage in parts of the city.

summary: Police arrested a man for allegedly murdering his father following a domestic dispute, creating shock among residents in the locality.
